_doc: Dark Ascension (DKA) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/dka.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 60C / 40U / 35R / 10M. Collation: sequential. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set with 13 double-faced cards; 9 commons per pack to make room for the DFC slot. Uses Innistrad basic lands (not part of the set). Marketing/ad cards bear tokens/emblems on the front but counted as ad card. Foil 1:67. 36 packs per box. AUDIT 2026-06: land-slot outcome re-pointed to set ISD — DKA prints no basics; packs used Innistrad basics 1/4 of the time, checklist 3/4 (checklists not modeled — slot always yields an ISD basic).

draft.tagline: 9 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
